message:
fix: Nix flake build and gosec lint error (dolt-800oo)

Nix flake: replace GOTOOLCHAIN=auto (cannot download in sandbox) with
postPatch that relaxes go.mod version to match the available nixpkgs Go.
This fixes the go.mod requires go >= 1.25.6 build failure.

Lint: handle rows.Close() return value to satisfy gosec G104.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
